name: Kagura
intro: Kagura, the Onmyouji Master, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Yin Yang Gathering
abilities.description: Shield CC Upon retrieving the Seimei Umbrella , Kagura gains a 450 (+50% Total Magic Power) shield , stuns nearby enemies for 0.5 second, and slows them by 60% for 1 second. Cooldown 4.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Seimei Umbrella Open
abilities.description: Damage Slow Kagura sends the Seimei Umbrella to the target location, dealing 315–590 (+105% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in its path and slowing them by 60% for 0.5 second. The Umbrella will automatically return to Kagura when she's too far away. This skill deals 130% damage to non-hero enemies.
